# format: html5-dom-v2
# status: active

#dom-snapshot-v2
#document
  element ns=html local="html" attrs=[]
    element ns=html local="head" attrs=[]
      element ns=html local="title" attrs=[]
        "&unknown; &#xD800; &amp"
      element ns=html local="style" attrs=[]
        "&amp; &#xD800;"
      element ns=html local="script" attrs=[]
        "&amp; &#xD800;"
    element ns=html local="body" attrs=[]
      element ns=html local="p" attrs=[{ns=none prefix=- local="title" value="&unknown; &#xD800; &amp"}]
        "ok"
